ideation: This animation sequence portrays the action of holding a purse.  The gesture should be delicate and somewhat refined.  The robot will hold the purse close to its body, implying care and ownership.  The animation will use both arms in a symmetrical pose. The sequence begins with both arms raised slightly in preparation for holding the purse. Then, both arms move to gently cradle the purse, the wrists slightly angled to mimic the shape and weight of the purse. The sequence ends with both arms returning to a neutral position.

frames.beat: arms lift slightly, ready to hold something precious
arms draw in, gently cradling the unseen purse
the purse is held close, a delicate pose
arms return to rest, the purse is put away
